top_tweets.text:
Open Design now works inside Codex.

The hardest part of AI design isn’t generating one screen — it’s keeping design intent alive as you iterate, build, and ship.

Now your agent can work with the canvas directly.
Design → code → motion, in one workflow.

Here’s a quick demo: https://t.co/GWMYmKp6dj
top_tweets.author: nexudotio
top_tweets.name: Open Design
top_tweets.summary_zh: Nexu 推出 Open Design 與 Codex 整合功能，讓 AI agent 可以直接操作設計畫布，從設計、程式碼到動畫一次完成，解決 AI 設計過程中保持設計意圖的最大痛點。

top_tweets.text: 2019 was technological masturbation. you cared more about state management libraries than the value the app they were being used for was providing. leaning into product and outcomes is infinitely more fulfilling than that bikeshedding bullshit.
top_tweets.author: kenwheeler
top_tweets.name: patagucci perf papi
top_tweets.summary_zh: 2019 年開發者過度沉迷技術細節（如 state management libraries），如今聚焦產品成果與實際價值才是更有意義的方向。

top_tweets.text:
🪄 Introducing Ardot, Tencent's AI-native design agent platform. 

Ardot covers the entire UI/UX workflow:

→ Design to code in one click. Work with CodeBuddy via MCP & Workbuddy, Cursor, Claude Code via MCP IDE.

→ Prompt to design. Describe it or drop an image. Get a fully https://t.co/vuosCgTgpE
top_tweets.author: TencentAI_News
top_tweets.name: Tencent AI
top_tweets.summary_zh: 騰訊推出 AI 原生設計 agent 平台 Ardot，覆蓋完整 UI/UX 工作流程，支援設計轉程式碼、prompt 生成設計，並可與 Cursor、Claude Code 等工具整合。

top_tweets.text:
I think Google did an incredible job with the new Gemini app

They use and adaptive native design systems from both Android (Material You) and iOS (Liquid Glass), and it still feels unique with Google's overarching design.  

They've now done the best job of any app I've seen
top_tweets.author: mweinbach
top_tweets.name: Max Weinbach
top_tweets.summary_zh: Google 新版 Gemini app 在 Android（Material You）與 iOS（Liquid Glass）上都採用原生設計系統，同時保持 Google 整體設計語言，是跨平台設計的優秀範例。

top_tweets.text:
Gemini 3.5 Flash 🤝 @Antigravity

Watch how the model deploys multiple subagents to design and build an entire city. https://t.co/jI1e5ND8md
top_tweets.author: GoogleDeepMind
top_tweets.name: Google DeepMind
top_tweets.summary_zh: Gemini 3.5 Flash 與 Antigravity 合作展示多 agent 協作能力，可自動設計並建構完整城市。

top_tweets.author: WebDesignMuseum
top_tweets.name: Web Design Museum
top_tweets.summary_zh: Photoshop logo 從 1988 到 2025 年的演變歷史。

top_tweets.text: NEW: Apple is shaking up its hardware engineering ranks, changing its management of Product Design and expanding the roles of several key silicon and hardware leaders. https://t.co/uyJfRGkXqm

top_tweets.text:
You can now create more with Claude Design.

We've doubled token limits across every plan. https://t.co/d2AemkZUxW

top_tweets.text: seems to me the AI commencement speaker thing is an artifact of AI not actually being a consumer product. it's mostly bought by management. it's sort of like a steamroller or something. so the hype gets the decisionmakers to go in on it, which is why they have all the 'this will
top_tweets.author: n_hold
top_tweets.name: Nate Holdren
top_tweets.summary_zh: AI 目前主要是管理層採購的產品而非真正的消費者產品，因此行銷策略聚焦在吸引決策者而非終端使用者。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容
